channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: VOO and Chill — 84 replies — 336.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
VOO and Chill

Open thread • Replies: 84 • Updated: 2026-06-26 01:44 UTC

OP

The more I look into investing and compare the historical returns of certain ETFs / individual stocks it seems like the whole philosophy of “VOO and Chill” is equal parts really smart and retarded
It’s like a no brainer for money but even now as long as the market is in a growth period shouldn’t you at least do QQQ?
It seems so simple that’d you miss a lot of upside but the returns are honestly not bad and extremely consistent
How accurate is this assessment? It’s both so simple and guaranteed that everyone should it but also too safe so you end up missing out on more upside
I’m talking 5-20 years investing here not trading

Early replies (first 3)

62400515
Boomer funds are gay and lame

62400554
>>62400515
What qualifies as one
Why
What crypto do you want to shill

62400560
boglehead method is the tried and tested way, buy the market with an index fund that has a low fee, invest monthly, do it consistently for decades and you WILL be rich
but biz/anons don't care about being rich when they're older, they want to be rich NOW
greed is a deadly sin

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62407078
>>62400493
yeah I have like almost half a million in VTI right now, and I just need to sit on it for another 10 years. Its funny, I get excited whenever VTI goes down because it means i get a little bonus next deposit

62407086
Man I want to just have more principal to invest rather than chasing returns
Anyone know of good side hustles or AI grifts anyone can do
Idc as long as it’s triple digits a month at least

62407097
>>62406776
with Trump's economy + trade wars, VXUS actually went up a ton during the period and now a lot of countries are getting less and less dependent on America. If/when the AI bubble ever pops then you're going to be a lot more insulated since the American economy is being propped up by it.

62409216
>>62407097
Makes sense but aren’t all global economies just going to be downstream of American AI / Computing companies turning a profit?

62409221
>>62402005
pr34ch

62409463
>>62400515
>t. down 95% in fartniggercoin

62409479
>ETF and chill is smart but I'm smarter I can time the market!

62409545
>>62400493
honestly everything is fucked. index fund bagholders are forced to buy shitstocks and act like paypiggies for pump and dumpers like elon musk. it's literally causing a bubble. nobody wins except billionaires who force your grandma's retirement fund to pay for their malfunctioning AI.

62409811
>low fee index funds
it's VTI and VXUS for me

62409901
>>62400636
lol doomer, stop spreading negativity. you will be a lot happier even if you just invested 150 a month.

62410053
>>62409901
>Realism is negativity!

62410067
>>62400493
wtf are you doing bringing common sense into my retard and bot zoo?

62410086
>>62400636
>The problem is we have people starting at age 35 with like 150 a month thinking it's going to somehow mean something.
pop quiz! how much would you expect your money to grow over 150 months (12.5 years) with a conservative 6% annual return?

62410375
Yep just bought another share of VOO

62410405
>>62403053
They are also expecting SS and medicare to buff out their income and reduce their costs. Everyone here is likely planning to have no SS or other government pension.

62410414
>>62402995
>>62403044
Really you two are dumb as fuck. Do you not understand what FIRE is?

VOO has 15% CAGR since inception. 11.75% after inflation. With even a generous withdrawal rate you can live very comfortably on it if you have enough capital. My business partner does this, goes on vacations all the time. He has a couple of million invested across UK-equivalent ETFs like VUSA. Loads of people do this, it's not the absolute best use of capital but it's a good return for how liquid and low fee it is.
>>62403044
Learn to read you fucking imbecile. I posted that only millionaires CAN LIVE OFF IT. . Anyone can invest and make gains from ETFs but you won't get rich unless you invest for decades.
>Also getting rich quick is literally the point of all this
The point of what? Investing? No it isn't. The point of ETFs? LOL. You are just some dumb teen shitcoiner with sky high time preference I can just tell. Go and buy more shitcoins so you can "get rich quick" dickhead.

62410968
>>62410414
This is why I just wanna get as much capital in there as soon as possible it just seems like something I can actually control versus chasing returns
Don’t have any ideas though

62410981
>>62407086
how about a job nigger

62411192
>>62410981
I am currently at my full time salary job right now silly

62412068
VOO bros are up bigly today

62413691
>>62412068
sweet

62413705
>>62400493
Felix and friends on youtube has a good way of putting it. Why invest in 500 companies when 50%+ are going down and sideways? If you have the time and money and a good strategy you can stick to you're better off picking stonks. But most people don't have the time, money and discipline to do so.

62413718
>>62413705
I think it's more like 20% of the s&p carries the other 80%, it is definitely lopsided. He (an ex investment banker) preaches buy and hold is a dead strategy.

62413734
>>62410053
Your "realism" doesn't sound realistic to people who actually do this stuff. It sounds retarded, like you've got no idea what you're actually talking about.

62413777
>>62413705
>>62413718
bc i cannot pick the winners, simple, look what happened today

62413963
If you don't just want to do VOO and chill only, just have a separate account at Vanguard that you treat like a savings account and deposit something there monthly to buy VOO or whatever. You'll be glad later on.

62414091
>>62412068
>checking your account daily
>investing only in one country

62414103
For me its 90% VOO
10% GPIQ
So i win even when I crab

62414142
>>62413705
>Felix and friends on youtube
>ex investment banker
>"Discover A Trading System That Makes Market Headlines Irrelevant"

62414162
>>62400493
Fuck VOO
>50% VT
>50% VTI
That's the real chill. Total U.S. investment is 81% of portfolio, you capture emerging markets, and some great companies you otherwise wouldn't have in VOO or VTI alone.

item.title: BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM!!! — 54 replies — 126.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM!!!

Open thread • Replies: 54 • Updated: 2026-06-26 01:25 UTC

OP

>Today, Chainlink, FairSquareLab, a first-mover in core infrastructure within the Korean digital asset ecosystem, UniKA (Unified Korea Alliance), which represents the Korean coalition behind Project Pangea and is comprised of a steering committee of 5 entities (Shinhan Bank, JB Bank, Kbank, FairSquareLab, and OBDIA) along with 10+ participating Korean commercial banks, and Qivalis, a euro stablecoin consortium powered by 37 leading European banks, announced Project Pangea, a strategic, collaborative task force focused on redefining global foreign exchange markets by unlocking real-time, stablecoin-based cross-border settlement models.


https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/chainlink-and-multinational-banking-consortia-launch-project-pangea-to-develop-t0-settlement-framework-for-international-fx-markets-302807910.html

Early replies (first 3)

62401710
Wow I can’t wait for this to not mean anything.

62401722
p+c etc.
don't care until the needle moves on this FUCKING GODDAMN TOKEN

62401738
>>62401704
xrp sneeded?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62409593
BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM SHAKALA. I am new to 4chan but have been loving this meme lately! I read on reddit yesterday that this would happen and I boughted (but unfortunately the price basically immediately soon after). I was still so pumped I went to Costco and got a slice of pizza and sat facing those walking out looking at everyone walking by knowing and rye-ly smiling knowing none of them understood what is happening. I felt like Brownstone Capital with Ben Rickerts in the Big Short. I had to stop myself from celebrating because I remembered they were missing out and I wanted to feel the same type of compassion they were reminded to feel by Ben in that moment so I finished my pizza solemnly leaving a bite out of clenched stomach respect for them not being able to finish my meal, grabbed my bag, put my hood up, and walked out nodding to the door inspector knowing looking at them knowingly and humanly as I walked out with them smiling not knowing beneath my shades how I was really seeing them. It was an amazing experience and it felt like everyone was watching but I know they weren't because the thing that made it special was that they don't understand or see. I will come back and tip the kitchen staff handsomely (especially the girl who I like but have not had the courage to ask out....yet) when we are making bookoo bucks and I can afford to own the whole store and promote her. and then smirk as I tell her I will sell the store, non-chalantly, so that I can ask her so she would feel comfortable if I ask her out on a date after I made her general manager of the store. I can't wait!

62409606
>>62409593
This might literally be the gayest, most link investor typified thing I have ever seen on this site in over a decade of lurking and posting all day and it is way too perfect to be a troll. Holy fucking shit.

62409613
>62409593
>62409606
Obvious samefag, absolutely pathetic lol

62409630
>>62409613
What does that mean (seems like a slur, no)? I just wanted to share a really awesome moment where I had a sort of micro-epiphany and specific sort of sonder imagining the future and knowing what we know, how most people just don't see. Why is this a bad thing? It was the best day I have had in a long time and I have been feeling really optimistic ever since and the awe I felt in this moment carried over really perfectly into the movie I went to see after (Disclosure Day), which had me thinking about how even though we see so much and are so knowledgeable, imagine what the aliens must see! There is probably some sort of alien Chainlink that other aliens zip around feeling this way about how we don't see or or maybe even a super Chainlink that they know that other aliens don't, if they aren't a hivemind super-intelligence or transcendent above the type of feeling or incapable of empathy at all. I just had a really deep moment and layed in bed thinking about it as well as how my revelation carried into the movie and then up up and away and I wanted to share it hoping it made someone else here think deep thoughts or feel optimistic too! We are going to be so freaking rich!!!

62409633
>what does that mean?
fucking newfags

62409639
>>62409633
Why do you guys keep calling me gay? I mean, I am bi but what's wrong with that? I am one of you! We should be able to band together Voltron this shit! LINK doesn't need us to for it to thrive but we might as well be in harmony as our investment carries us hand in hand to the moon!

62409640
>>62409606
>>62409613

62409661
>>62409640
How i feel in this thread! Meanwhile, I got the picture I am attaching to this comment in my back pocket, (which none of them know) just waiting to pull it out like the ultimate trump card. (¬‿ ͡¬) Dare I?

62409666
>>62406112
I don't know, but I sipped more link

62409669
>>62409666
>>62409583

62409675
>mB3FqHQS

62409679
>>62409675
Who is this? He looks crazy and scared. Is this from a movie or something? I don't recognize it. TL;DR?

62409681
>>62409675
I just saw you named the picture xrp. Are you saying this is XRP realizing the severity of what I posted in "62409661?" If so, post it again, because you are surely right!

62409739
i don't care anymore. they could do away with the token and send it to 0 and I would just post a LINK and picrel crossover thread to laugh at the copers who will be forever employed and get on with the rest of my life as if nothing happened and i didn't spend thkusands of hours reseaeching bullshit and making rarely reposted link memes for 7 years.
fuck you saturn

62409752
>>62409661
bless the undeserving, king

62409768
>>62409739
do things like that really happen though? No watchers, no justice? the whole token just poof?

62409835
>>62409752
*drops shades revealing the same knowing look from before, but sharper, and slams the picture down on table* BOOOOOM!

62409844
>>62409835

62409848
>>62409844
Exactly!

62409884
>>62409768
the token doesn't need monetary value to serve its technical purposes, you can incentivize everyone with other assets, staking has obviously been unnecessary to secure value etc. it's "happened" in all but name. but it might work out anyway, idk.

62409907
price

62410035
>>62409884
>the token doesn't need monetary value to serve its technical purposes
Same is true for Bitcoin, ETH, ...
Bitcoin was arguably way more secure when it was literal cents, and random faggots ran full mining nodes on their home PCs.

62410246
>mB3FqHQS
I've said it before and I'll say it again: the BOOOOOM meme absolutely destroyed some xerpies on here. Can't believe that after all the abuse and bullying they took for 10 years, simply posting the catchphrase of one of their twitter schizos is what did them in. Praying for you crazy bastards.

62411245
>>62410035
>duuuude it's not fair, bitcoin did xyz...

so how does it work in your head? 40 million altcoins should all have bitcoin or ethereum type price runup so things can become... fair?

you see folks, this is how the logic of a chainlink boyscout operates. no understanding that there isn't enough liquidity for their special altcoin to run like early crypto's did back when there was only like 50 of them. no understanding that obviously they aren't early anymore and therefore the days of those speculative runs are over.

instead of accepting the market they have, they cry like a child complaining to their parents that the other kids were allowed to have cookies before dinner.

they are: the few, the retarded... THE Cuckolds of crypto

62411677
>>62410035
i don't think the same is true for btc and eth. their ongoing function and adoption (by miners) depended on value realizable by the token. Link apparently doesn't have the same restriction.

62411795
>>62411677
>i don't think the same is true for btc and eth
Not only is what I said true for btc and eth, but both operated beautifully for a long time at a value of literally cents, proving that what I said is true for btc and eth.

>>62411245
>BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB, XRP, ADA, TRX, Link, ... don't need monetary value to serve its technical purposes
>but ONLY Link cannot pump because of this reason

How does that work in your head?

62413787
>>62411795
at no point were eth or eth block rewards worth cents. btc, fair enough point, but you will concede that further adoption and miner buildout since that brief time has happened almost exclusively because of future price.
the same is not true for link, where price isn't the product or even a feature of its ongoing adoption.

62413804
>>62410246
I don't understand. How did the meme destroy them? I thought it was just us doing a sort of thing like the Costco Guys thing to have a sort of war cry and celebration chant over our success when news came out about link? That is the only context I have seen the meme so far here.

62413805
>>62401710
The future is now

62414082
>>62413805
What if we've always been living in the future as alien avatars and we traveled back in time to give Chainlink to ourselves (people say this about the small grey aliens a lot that they are like bio robots controlled remotely, what if they were implanted with our incarnated spirits?) and so the future was always? Brain BLOWN!

item.title: What the actual FUCK is this? — 22 replies — 88.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
What the actual FUCK is this?

Open thread • Replies: 22 • Updated: 2026-06-26 01:50 UTC

OP

What the actual FUCK is this?

Early replies (first 3)

62410973
>>62410915
Thank you for playing

62411210
They just did their AMA but banned any questions related to:

- The token
- Revenue
- Unlocks
- Buy backs
- The reserve
- Staking
- Timelines

They basically just responded to a bunch of questions like "We know Chainlink is the industry standard and already being adopted by major institutions but how can the community help"
Follow by answers like
"Talk to your friends and family to spread awareness, follow us on social media and share our posts"

It was just an excuse for them to ask holders to shill LINK to their family so they can get more liquidity to dump the 18 million tokens that unlocked for them this week

62411645
>>62411210
Buy our tokens so we can keep making these 'patnership' headlines that you read on secondary market (4chan)

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62411772
>>62410915
A visual representation of how Chainlink Labs is in fact ABOVE the chainlink TOKEN.
The link token will continue its downward trajectory into irrelevance

62411846
>>62411210
brutal.

t. i own 565 links tokwens

62411852
>>62411645
jesus fuking christ

62411855
>>62410973
i really did miss another bullrun didnt i .


i promise to god im selling it all next bull run when we hit 17 dollars, cant sell now... too late for that.

62412054
>>62411855
TNN

You really fell for a bunch of buzzwords and low tier shilling by schizophrenic baggies kek

62412075
>>62410915
Aaaaaaah it's over!!
I should have listened to the fuddies! I should have sold and bought xrp instead! Aaaaaaaaa!

62412108
>>62412054
yup i wasted 4 years of my life invesnting to get like 600 link tokens

62412114
>>62412075
And here we see a link marine being unable to comprehend that he and the xrp army are two faces of the same retarded coin.

62412123
>>62412114
Nooooo! I should have bought BTC! AAAAAAAAAA

62412174
>>62412123
No, you should continue to buy chainlink as it sinks to zero. Sergey really appreciates your donations.

62412690
>>62411210
>- The token
>- Revenue
>- Unlocks
>- Buy backs
>- The reserve
>- Staking
>- Timelines
Absolutely brvtal, jeetlinkers have been thoroughly raped.

62413749
while this might be true, i forbid you from selling

62413788
i feel like we dump maybe another 10%, but the bottom feels close

62413835
>>62413788
>but the bottom feels close

summer is always the worst time for markets and summer only just started

62413846
>>62413835
ever hear of defi summer?

62413973
>>62413846
>Chainlink summer of dreams

62413986
>>62413973

Stop...don't remind me

62414045
>>62411210
>fuddies pretending that some major thing or break from the usual poor comms is going to come out of a fuckin discord ama
Slow day in the fudcuck x gooner chat I'm guessing eh brownoids? Lmfao

62414156
>>62413973
I hate that this picture looks a lot like me. I wish I never fucking bought this coin.

item.title: UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD #1 — 159 replies — 83.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD #1

Open thread • Replies: 159 • Updated: 2026-06-25 23:57 UTC

OP

Brothers,

SpaceX has begun to rise. Its success or fall is of little importance to us in the short term.

In the meanwhile we must devise ways to gain a spot at the table with our kin in the six figure club.

I for one propose we spend our time learning a subject. Knowledge is the greatest wealth of all.

However, I would be remiss to not tell the truth that I haven't a clue what we should study.

So instead I suggest we create an eggregore for these threads. Others made monero-chan, bobo and sminem

I am thinking we create one based on a girl who would be willing to believe in us while we are poor and brave the pain throughout having to witness our more disappointing moments of action. Never losing faith in us, she is always there. Yes. This is how we shall spend our time.

At any rate, that is my suggestion for tonight's fun. I have to work in the morning so let's not get too rowdy. Take it or leave it. If you will take it, then be sure to double it and pass it on to the next anon.

Let us commence the general!

Come one, come all!

Early replies (first 3)

62373772
>>62373752
Jannies will surely delete these threads. Instead of creating an eggregore why not try something new and usurp an old one. It may be a derivative of one which has already been made.

62373798
>>62373772
Hello anon thanks for joining. You are poster #1. Your anime image shall be the eggregore. The "coffee" in the image is rather a good omen. We all know images with hot girls accompanied by a brief post on coffee attracts all the attention.

Now that matter is settled, help me add some links to this post here. This will be the header for the start of each general

Helpful links

>Educational materials
https://w9.kaijimanga.com/

>Looking to try the TCG route?
https://youtube.com/@alphainvestments69?si=tDAPjnRSZhyCIGP5

>Lost all hope?
https://www.indeed.com/


>Hidden in plain sight
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Limitless_(film)

>Games to strengthen you financial acumen
https://mahjongsoul.yo-star.com/

>Learn your from your betters
https://ia600609.us.archive.org/3/items/the-house-of-rothschild-ferguson-niall/The%20House%20of%20Rothschild%20-%20Ferguson%2C%20Niall.pdf
What is the name of that character in your post?

62373799
>>62373772
verily, a true fact

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62398876
>>62398868
https://voca.ro/1aI6fGYlNRNN

62398905
>>62394942
Don’t get that either. Even if you only bought full shares how could you not afford 200 dollars worth of shares? Is this under 10k net worth or under 100$ net worth

62399272
>>62398789
>Wavelength (λ) (THE SYMBOL IN HALF LIFE)

Distance between repeating points of a wave (e.g., crest to crest). Determines frequency and, for light, color.

>Amplitude:

Maximum height of the wave. Determines intensity (brightness for light, loudness for sound).

>Phase

Position of a wave within its cycle. Determines how waves add or cancel when combined.

>Polarization

Direction of oscillation of a transverse wave. For light, it is the orientation of the electric field.

62399358
Tomorrow we shall give predictive programming a try as photonics will likely be a difficult venture

62399394
10k- networth reporting in! You guys are too smart for me with all those grand ideas.

62400367
>>62398789
tl;dr

62401110
7 figure club. I already lost more than 10k today at market open. Stay poor fags

62401765
I just wrote a super long post with all sorts of trade basics and an emphasis for this group to define normal position exit conditions so you can tangibly ask anons "did you exit before, during, or after the standardized 4chan-exit signals?" Along with recommending covered calls for slow moving but trend holding markets like gold/BTc/xmr or oil when watching forex markets. 10y+dxy are good to watch too.
Blah blah blah
But this whole thread degenerated into trying to sell "art", and not every anon working together for every group success to contribute to all that participate, but rather instead for every anon to work on their own project, by themselves, but as a group selling the same products/watering down their labor's value.

>>62401110
This is who you should ask for advice. This anon only lost 1% of his shit n that's if he's only got 1m. Not a big deal. Don't you anons want to be able to lose 10k casually n be unbothered yet responsible?

62401809
>>62401765
I did it the hard way. Degree in finance. Work in finance. Almost 20 years. Been investing since the 08 crash. There's no quick trick or easy money. Crypto is bullshit. Just keep buying.

62401893
Six figures is truly hell, I miss being proud of 70k.

62403333
>>62401765
It was one art guy

62403337
>>62401765
This general also is a work in progress, I am hoping 10 generals from now we have a much better work flow, plan and ultimately success. In some capacity.

62404260
Bump

62404574
No point in this general. Fastest way to make 10k is just to work for a bit, you shouldn’t be investing

62404709
Bump

62404737
>>62373752
its a spacex thread?
its time to buy o better buy in few days one week

62405715
bump

62407354
Page 8 bump, /biz/ must be losing money again because there's an uptick in activity.

62407450
almost 9 months since i started my first job after college
this feels stagnant and joyless
what exactly do i need to do to escape wageslavery and poverty

62407931
Someone send me ten grand so I can join the club, thanks

62408558
>>62407450
What were you doing in 2017, 2021 and December of 2024?

62408565
>>62407354
Thank you, my wage job prevents me from dedicating my energies to this thread but I should have some time soon

62408611
>>62408584
Wtf are you on about dude, yes I made 54 posts over the span of 8 days. I'm surprised you're not taking your own advice and leaving 4chan.

62410044
Bump

62410051
Under 10k you just need to have a job and save cash.
You need cash flow and if you dont have shit a job is the only way to start.

62410731
Bump

62411520
>>62408558
>2017
still in high school
>2021
still in uni
>December of 2024
just graduated and was looking for jobs (i still had 0 dollars to my name at that point)

62411614
>>62373752
>>62373772
>>62373798
>>62373799
>>62373803
>post Maccari's "Cicero Denounces Catiline" (1888)
>crop out Catiline
Fuck you OP, I'm glad you're poor.

62412314
>>62411520
You could've played the memecoin casino in 2021.

62413842
Bump, I'll be free tomorrow

item.title: >only down 4% from its ipo, which is very reasonable >now we know the price floor is $150 now is the time to buy SPCX — 17 replies — 68.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>only down 4% from its ipo, which is very reasonable >now we know the price floor is $150 now is the time to buy SPCX

Open thread • Replies: 17 • Updated: 2026-06-26 01:50 UTC

OP

>only down 4% from its ipo, which is very reasonable
>now we know the price floor is $150
now is the time to buy SPCX

Early replies (first 3)

62408493
>>62408480
Bagholder cope.

62408507
>>62408493
No cope saar only gains to be made! Please buy more stocks from this very profitable company! Time is limited for maximum gains must hurry before money train takes off!

62408519
>>62408480
>>only down 4% from its ipo,
kek about to 50% in 6 months

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62409551
>>62408480
>Has 9 days of data points.
>Yeah this is enough to predict the future.
Retards gonna retard.

62409673
>>62408480
t. Bought at 190 and panickingly trying to get others to hold his bags

62409699
>>62408480
Don't you realize 40% of the supply will be dumped in 2 months?

62409869
>>62408480
>buy my bags goy
no I don't think I will, I would consider buying stocks after the market corrects 50-75% from the current peak

62409872
>>62408480
IPO was $135

62409875
This is basically the perfect asset and the greatest IQ test in history. Ask yourself one question, do YOU want to fuck prostitutes on Mars?

62409882
>>62409875
id rather fuck them in my bedroom on earth. or my kitchen. or my living room...

62411812
>>62409551
>>62409673
>>62409699
>>62409872
150 is the floor

62411816
>>62408480
FLOOR BROS
WE'RE TESTING AGAIN

62411883
>>62409551
Yep. The insider shares haven't even been unlocked. Why is he in such a rush? Just wait. Massive supply coming in a couple of months. Michael Howell already says marginal liquidity in financial markets is lower.

Thus, SUPPLY++ & DEMAND??? = Likely lower price.

62414040
>>62408480
should I buy in now? I want to hold some before starship 13

62414121
>>62408480
with only 5% of the float available or w/e. holy shit yall are fucked when it opens up

62414137
>>62408480
Melon got re-bogged and fattened which he only does when things are going badly for him
2x short because of this

62414157
>>62408480
>We privatized NASA and now we want you to pay us to see Hollywood for scientists productions
Yeah, nah. I saw Kubrick admit to faking the moon landing.

62413931
>>62413861

62413941
>>62413861
its time to just poop your pants, basically. it's a pants pooping world. that's how it is now. we're all pants poopers. you're a pants pooper or you're out. so, are you in?

62413952
kek I hope your president bails them out and sinks your country like anchor and EU returns to #1

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62413955
>>62413861
Still listening to that zero hedge fag?

62413962
whatever. you think they're not gonna come up with any excuse to accelerate mega datacenter buildout and all other foundational infrastructure needed to eventuate the mass surveillance empire we are already programmed to accept?

I'm 100% in Micron because I just want to afford a white nurse

62413966
>>62413861
This is bullish for AI. The circus goes on.

62414024
>>62413861
But saaar, ai bestest thing since aliced bread, i cannot even BREATH withould ai blody!

62414030
>>62413955

https://www.nytimes.com/2026/06/25/technology/openai-ipo-artificial-intelligence.html

>>62413941

>>62413952
Lol The EU is the laughing stock of the western world and deserves to be. You are a literal Orwell state.
>>62413962

62414035
>>62414030
openai sucks donkey dick

62414070
>>62414035
So does Sam per the court docs and his sister. So does every other pseud faggot technologist founder type trying to drive this shit. All of them deserve ruin and failure and the world would be better for it if they were sent to Guantanamo for what they tried and permanently cut off from society or influencing anyone ever again even guards. I hope it happens.

62414104
Damn, I can't believe the bubble's popped for the ninth time in a row
>>62413962
Same

62414116
>>62414030
>>62413861
The only reason they're postponing it is because of SPCX failure. The market is exhausted, money to invest is running out.

62414118
>>62414070
You sound like a mad little faggot

62414127
>>62414116
So its popping wo infinite dollar printing hyperinflation? Good!

62414138
>>62414118
You sound like a fat, down-bad baggie who limply slinks between corporate metanarratives instead of being a person.

62414147
>>62414116
Yeah..money to invest is running out..definitely not hitting a wall of absurd PE ratios and narrative gush and circular finance round tripping with chips as collateral built on private credit with zero revenue to make good on not measuring up or being able to deliver on the energy supply side of the system build. The market isn't exhausted, the narrative is and the bottom is falling out after fucking years despite the absurd index inclusion and forced passive flow injection of everyone's retirement accounts and pensions into this nothing slop that would be worse for humanity if it were able to deliver.

62414149
>>62413861
Musk successfully pushed them off it seems.

item.title: Why does SPCX have such a hard floor at $150? — 16 replies — 64.0/hr

Open thread • Replies: 16 • Updated: 2026-06-26 01:50 UTC

OP

Why does SPCX have such a hard floor at $150? Every time it gets under $151, like clockwork, someone buys

Early replies (first 3)

62412944
>>62412935
This has always been 100% a Man.

62413007
>>62412935
The person on this picture is transgender right? It has a penis right?

62413061
>>62412935
because vested interests require $150 to prop up a valuation of $1.5 trillion on a mountain of absolute fucking garbage.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62413074
>>62412944
>>62413007
No. Don't feel bad, many people have thought the same thing. Its not your fault tranners have gotten so hot over the past decade nce.

62413079
>>62412944
That man has the most fuckable face on internet.

62413083
>>62413074
This kid was like 2018

62413094
>>62412935
Those are the limit orders that didn't go through 2 weeks ago

62413098
>>62413094
Interesting, could you tell me more about that? So there are people who placed an order at $150 when it IPOd and then just left them there?

62413107
>>62413007
Uses her finger to penetrate

62413251
HIT OR MISS
I GUESS THEY NEVER MISS HUH?

62413351
>>62413098
>So there are people who placed an order at $150 when it IPOd and then just left them there?
Yes.

62413472
>>62413061
Possibly. But more likely it's >>62413094

62413536
So much tranny propaganda and trolls online that I never realized if OP pic is a man with a wig or a real qt pie woman.
TL:DR is that a man or not?

62413639
>>62413251
YOU GOT A BOYFRIEND, I BET HE DOESNT KISS YA
MUAH
I miss 2018

62413642
>>62413536
It’s a genuine woman. Though her hair looks like a wig, I will admit.

62414159
>>62413639
You'll say the same thing about 2026 when someone says 6-7 in 2035

item.title: I still can’t believe you stupid assholes spammed Nazi frog memes to shit up official chainlink stuff to where they had… — 10 replies — 40.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
I still can’t believe you stupid assholes spammed Nazi frog memes to shit up official chainlink stuff to where they had…

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-06-26 01:36 UTC

OP

I still can’t believe you stupid assholes spammed Nazi frog memes to shit up official chainlink stuff to where they had to specifically change shit up to make it out to be that they aren’t associated with 4chan.

It fucking Hitler himself bought into the ICO he wouldn’t have done anything nearly as gay as that. And it’s probably to the detriment of our investment. I hope they chain you faggots up at the yacht party and throw you overboard like in the movie Amistad.

Early replies (first 3)

62412604
Have they used that cube in any official marketing since May 2018? It’s incredible how that image pervades despite the rebrand over 8 years ago.

62412715
>>62412582
What are you, unironically, that you ask such questions? banker? 33rd degree mason? are we getting close?

62412742
LINK would never have survived its first bear market if it wasn't for the fanatics on /biz/. It would have gone the exact same way REQ did

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62412925
>>62412715
>that you ask such questions?
There is not a single question in the post

62412931
>>62412582
The Nazi frog spam will continue until the price improves

62413578
>>62412582
kek does somebody have the "a white man with a vision" cap under sergey's post?
that was peak really, everything went downhill from there.

62413593
>>62412582
Imagine being a world class institution like SWIFT and your only social media engagement is having Pepe and Apu PFP's screaming about some shitcoin integration and all because you made the mistake of talking to Sergey. Everything that dude touches turns to SHIT.

62413975
>>62413593
>glad you're on board, the last social media guy left
>why did he leave?
>we uh have a frog problem

62414081
>>62412931
It was before that

62414117
While the token price being 7usd all these years later is extremely irrelevant despite what you may believe. What is absolutely not irrelevant is the fact that Sergey basically got away with grabbing millions+ of cash in a funny time where crypto has none of the traditional protections of a stock. Eventually it won't be allowed for such a thing to happen again.

They should consider themselves very lucky to be able to do what they do. There's no bullshit now about wah link could be a security if we even merely discuss the token economics... Nah no the discord AMA proved the bullshit they need to be slapped around a bit for not actually answering important questions.

You can't have both. They can't expect people to stake 45m link and then not ask about what's next. They are supremely lucky to be able to do what they do and they need to know it

It has US gov approved stablecoin , and it's a protocol of trading for banks.
